name: Keen-Tucky Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss chopped cabbage lightly with sugar, carrots, salt, and pepper.
2. Drench all ingredients in milk. Cover and refrigerate for about 15 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, combine mayo, buttermilk, celery seed, pepper sauce, and onion.
4. Mix well with the cabbage mixture.
5. Refrigerate again for at least 1 hour before serving.
6. Drain some of the dressing first and serve it separately.
7. The coleslaw will settle quite a bit and keep refrigerated for up to 24 hours.
